response:
[Calling write_report(title="Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary (Latest Config)", content="# Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28  
**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

| Patient | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Approx. dose per administration (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick takeaways
- All three compassionate-use patients have current dosing entries and scheduled next-dose dates.
- No obvious inconsistencies are present in the latest dosing configuration.
- CU-003 is the newest enrollee and may warrant the closest follow-up given recent initiation of therapy and q2w schedule.
")]
